s: In 2013, Bruce Rondon suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.450, WHIP 1.360, SO 30, WAR 0.400.
In 2015, Bruce Rondon suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.810, WHIP 1.610, SO 36, WAR 0.100.
In 2016, Bruce Rondon suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.970, WHIP 0.960, SO 45, WAR 0.400.
In 2017, Bruce Rondon suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.910, WHIP 1.980, SO 22, WAR 0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> CHW).
In 2018, Bruce Rondon suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.490, WHIP 2.160, SO 40, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined CHW.
